Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time for SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to be followed by any reviewer response activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision, considering only variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to transition to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week measured until the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and the subsequent execution of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Time of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week relative to the start of the review phase initiated by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Reviewer Agreed after SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week across all process variants containing both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to SW-EIC Accept in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs within 7 days
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late, highlighting delay propagation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to the final decision (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision, SW-EIC Minor Revision, or SW-EIC Accept) in cases where at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed follows
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Average time it takes the process to reach SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation after SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week, conditioned on the occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'
